mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM problem p INNER JOIN path_level_problem plp ON p.id = plp.problem_id WHERE plp.level_id = #{levelId} ORDER BY plp.order_num ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO path_level_problem (level_id, problem_id, order_num, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{levelId}, #{problemId}, #{orderNum}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM path_level_problem WHERE level_id = #{levelId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO path_level_problem (level_id, problem_id, order_num, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.levelId}, #{item.problemId}, #{item.orderNum}, NOW(), NOW())
